_comment: Corpus designs the WASM engine is parity-checked against (issue #13 deliverable 8, >=3 required). Kept in JSON (not .ts) so guardrails R4 does not treat these golden-corpus design names as product-source special-casing. Each must have tests/golden_corpus/<name>/netlist.cir and a report with node-voltage measurements. Chosen for device coverage: passive divider (R), an E-source expression (LDO), and a MOSFET switch.
